steps.instruction: Opening the Protean (NSDL) PAN application portal
Pre-filling your name and address from your saved profile (Form 49A)
Complete Aadhaar e-KYC by entering the OTP sent to your Aadhaar-registered mobile. I will never see or store this OTP.
Pay the PAN processing fee (around 107 rupees for an Indian address) using your own payment method.
Review all details in Form 49A and submit the application yourself. Note the acknowledgement number.
